mutants.description: Scoped package without version returns 'unknown' instead of 'latest'
Version substring starts at versionAtIndex instead of +1, keeping the '@'
Scope substring uses scopeEndIndex instead of +1, dropping the '/' separator
Regular package guard flipped to firstAtIndex !== -1, mishandling no-version case
Scoped version separator uses lastIndexOf('@') instead of indexOf, splitting on wrong '@'

surviving_mutants.description: Scoped version separator uses lastIndexOf('@') instead of indexOf, splitting on wrong '@'

killed_mutants.description: Scoped package without version returns 'unknown' instead of 'latest'

Scoped version separator uses lastIndexOf('@') instead of indexOf, splitting on wrong '@'

mutants.description: Invalid scoped package without slash returns empty version instead of 'latest'
Regular package ending with '@' yields empty version, but uses substring with wrong index handling for empty afterScope cases
